raw_input:
[4.0/5] Refreshing Soap for Your Face as Well as Your Body This black soap bar feels as thick as a brick but feels great on my skin. It's made with activated charcoal and has the coloring of charcoal, but thankfully not the scent! Under a hot shower it releases a nice minty scent and the hardy soap appears to less vulnerable to melting away in the soap dish unlike other softer soaps I've used. It's made for men but I don't see why women can't use it as well, as it's refreshing. It's best used for the face, as it cleans out your pores, but as I wash my face and body in the shower at the same time, it's a perfect face body combination soap. [4.0/5] A high-quality soap with great aroma, foaming and cleansing that I plan to use quite often Review of: TCM Men's Cleansing Activated Charcoal Bar Soap - For all skin types - 5oz (1 Pack)

In the handful of times that I’ve used the TCM Charcoal Bar Soap I’ve noticed a number of items that I’ve been really pleased to experience.

The first is the size of the bar; no wimpy sliver of soap here. The bar right around 3 inches in length, 1 ¾ inches wide and 1 ½ inches tall. A size big enough that, until I used the soap enough times to round off the edges, the size was almost too large to hold easily using just one hand.

A second, immediately noticeable, item was the smell. Not a sweet smell but more of a slight, dusky, flower-like aroma that, for me at least, was super nice. Perhaps, in it’s own way, as nice an aroma as I’ve found with any bar of soap.

The amazing amount of lather this bar gives off was another pleasant surprise, far more than I had expected from something that doesn’t fit into the ‘body-wash’ category. When washing my face, I only need to rub the bar in my hands a couple of times and then when the soap is rubbed onto my face the suds really start forming. The lather is impressive, especially compared to other ‘cleansing’ bars I’ve used before.

The charcoal, or maybe it’s some other ingredient, does seem to do a nice job of cleaning my face, especially after I’ve applied sun screen earlier in the day. Sun screen, in my experience, soaks into my skin really deeply and is almost like a magnet in attracting dirt, and many ‘regular’ soaps simply don’t seem to cut through the grim. The TCM soap, however, removes any embedded dirt and also does away with the slick feeling the sun screen leaves on my face. noticed that many cleaning soaps especially after washing my face.

On the other-side-of-the-coin, however, I’ve noticed that the TCM Charcoal Bar Soap leaves my skin drier than I expected; for me there was no real sense of having any moisturizing left on my face after washing. This dryness was apparent to me as, after washing, my face was almost too dry to be able to comfortably use my electric razor. Still, while that was a surprise to me I don’t consider the dryness to be a major concern compared to the cleaning benefits the soap gives.

All-in-all, the TCM Charcoal Bar is a high-quality soap that I plan to use quite often.

If this review was helpful, please click the Helpful button [2.0/5] my boyfriend knows his bar soap my boyfriend LOVES all kinds of bar soap!!! he gets soooo excited when a new 1 arrives. he really liked the fact that this 1 was charcoal... he's had many over the years and has really liked them... this 1... not so much. he said it feels more like a lotion rather than a soap... that being said, it does lather up very well. he said it is more of a grey then a black and he didnt like the size of the bar. he said it was awkward in his hand, but it dirtied the floor less than other charcoal soap. he didnt love this bar. I hope this was helpful. [5.0/5] Cleansing Bar This has been a great bar of soap in the shower to use as a body scrub. With the charcoal in it, my skin feels smoother and cleaner. It has a great scent to it as well. This is a nice thick bar of soap, though for 10 dollars, it is on the expensive side. [4.0/5] Smells nice but uncomfortable to hold I like the smell of this soap and I like how my skin feels after ri take a shower using this soap, bit I find the shape of it very uncomfortable to hold and use. There is a reason why mainstream soap bars have a certain shape rather than being cut as rectangular prism. [4.0/5] Good soap, big bar, and nice smell! I'm enjoying this soap!

The bar is a bit bigger than your typical bar, so that makes the ~$10 price tag somewhat OK, though I think it should be a bit less expensive.

Still, the soap works well and hasn't left me with any dry skin issues. My skin is particularly sensitive so I try not to change up my bath products frequently, but this has had no harmful effects of any kind after a few weeks of use.

The bar itself is holding up well, I'd say it wears down like any typical bar soap; no faster or slower.

There's no residue or anything like that from the bar. It lathers up like typical bar soap and washes off easily.

I do really enjoy the scent. It is very, very subtle, and not something you're going to pick up on post-shower, and I think a lot of the smell comes from the shea butter. Reminds me of that a bit with a "clean" scent to it. It isn't particularly masculine or feminine so I think everyone would like it.

If you need a good bar soap for sensitive skin, I think this one is worth a shot. Plus you'll replace it less frequently thanks to the large size. Note that I only use this in the shower, and I wouldn't recommend it for using as counter soap. For one, its too big and awkward for that, and it is probably not quite sensitive enough for daily face cleaning, which is the only reason I dropped a star (since its supposed to be). Instead, I use this strictly as body soap, and for that, it works very well! [5.0/5] Smells like spices and cleans great My dad is not a big fan of soaps but he loves this one. It smells like spices and is very nourishing on his skin. It cleans great as well. Suds up nicely and is easy to grip. Definitely recommend! [5.0/5] Deja la piel muy limpia Tiene una fragancia suave. Deja la piel muy limpia y suave. Hace espuma rápido. Mi esposo lo usa para cara y cuerpo. [5.0/5] Big and sharply cut, but cleans great! Got this to use on my face. My face tends to get oily through out the day, probably more then most. This charcoal soap is great. A little more expense for typical bar soap, but the same as buying a bottle of facewash. This soap is a rather large bar and didn't fit into my soap box. After using for a week, my soap container will shut with the edges worn down a little. This soap is my go to for face washing and even my beard. The scent is very light and doesn't linger. It lathers good and after you rinse with warm water my face feels smooth and clean. By the end of the day my face has a little oil again, but doesn't seem to be as bad. I believe my redness and couple acne spots has improved and more face washing hasn't dried out my skin. [5.0/5] Full size bar soap with natural plant oils and activated charcoal This bar soap is a nice full size and includes cleansing natural ingredients. It is free of any harsh chemicals and it has a fairly mild added scent. I would personally leave out the added fragrance but otherwise this is a very good soap formula that nourishes the skin and cleanses with the power of activated charcoal. [4.0/5] GIANT bar that smells incredible! Buy the 3 pack for better value This is a nice, fat bar of soap. I can NOT get over how fresh and CLEAN this smells! I could smell it before I even unwrapped the bar. This soap lathers up great and leaves my skin feeling soft, clean and smelling like the fresh air. I love a giant bar of soap and this fits the bill-its easy to hold on to.
Its feels nice and firm, so it doesnt dissolve too quickly, which is a good thing because it IS a bit pricey at 10 bucks for a single bar. I make sure to keep it up on a tray to make sure it dries out between uses. So far, I have used it about 3 weeks and its not even half way gone- so overall, it seems to be worth it, since I am usually replacing my bars by now.
**BONUS** My bathroom smells like i just cleaned the place ( I have a teen boy in here, so to say my bathroom smells good is a win)! I wonder if it would stain, because im seriously thinking of buying some just to put in my drawers and closets- thats how great it smells! If i buy more, i will make sure to buy the 3 pack- its a better value at just over 8 bucks a bar.

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Overall, customers are largely satisfied with this activated charcoal bar soap, with most giving it 4 or 5 stars. The soap is praised for its large size, pleasant scent, and effective cleansing abilities. Many reviewers note that it lathers well and leaves skin feeling clean and smooth. The charcoal ingredient is highlighted as being particularly good at deep cleaning, including removing sunscreen and unclogging pores.

The scent is frequently mentioned as a positive, described as minty, spicy, or having a subtle floral quality, with some noting it smells like shea butter. Several reviewers mention it works well for both face and body use, and one notes it helped reduce oiliness and acne.

On the downside, some customers find the shape awkward to hold, preferring a standard rectangular bar. A few note it can leave skin feeling dry, and some feel the single bar price of around 10 dollars is a bit high, though the large size is seen as good value. One reviewer notes it may dissolve faster than typical soaps if left sitting in water.

The soap appears to appeal to both men and women, though some reviewers suggest it skews slightly toward men. Overall, it is recommended for those looking for a natural, chemical-free cleansing bar with effective deep cleaning properties.
